basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: IIT Indian School of Mines Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: IIT Indian School of Mines Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) Research Associate (RA) Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per the norms of the Govt. of India for RA recruitment.
age_limit.details: As per the norms of the Govt. of India for RA recruitment.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Earth Science with at least one research paper in SCI Journal, Master's degree in Applied Geophysics/Geology/Geoinformatics from a reputed institute with 60% above or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: PhD in Earth Science with at least one research paper in SCI Journal. Master's degree in Applied Geophysics/Geology/Geoinformatics from a reputed institute with 60% above or equivalent CGPA.

salary_details.details: Rs. 61,000/- plus HRA (1st year) Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA (2nd year)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate (RA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate (RA) positions at IIT ISM Dhanbad is 06th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a PhD in Earth Science with at least one SCI journal publication. Additionally, a Master's degree in Applied Geophysics, Geology, or Geoinformatics from a reputable institute with 60% or equivalent CGPA is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Associate (RA) post announced by IIT ISM Dhanbad in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate (RA) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 61,000/- plus HRA for the first year and Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA for the second year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Interested candidates need to send their applications to the designated email address as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate (RA) positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) applying for the Research Associate (RA) positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Research Associate (RA) positions will be based on an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT ISM Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: IIT ISM Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, in the state of Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Research Associate (RA) recruitment at IIT ISM Dhanbad is SRDP 1333 I.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode specified for this recruitment is strictly via email. Offline applications will not be considered.
